name: Caribbean Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked chicken or turkey, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken, rice, celery, green pepper, pineapple, and pimiento in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl or jar, whisk together yogurt, mayonnaise, lemon juice, curry powder, salt, and pepper until well blended.
3. Pour the dressing over the chicken mixture and stir gently until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
